title: elisanthe noctiflora
intro: Elisanthe noctiflora, also known as Night-blooming Jasmine, is a fragrant, flowering plant native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant's flowers and leaves have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, possessing anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety, and promote relaxation. Elisanthe noctiflora has been used to treat various health issues, including insomnia, indigestion, and skin conditions, and its herbal preparations include teas, infusions, and topical creams. The plant's essential oil is also used in aromatherapy to promote a sense of calm and well-being.
